title: Pixie Sprites Origins Pack
description: An Origins pack that contains three pixie sprites, the Sun, Forge, and Skip Sprites.
body:
# Pixie Sprites✨
Tiny fae that fly using pixie dust, each sprite has unique properties.
They all share a love for freedom, and a penchant for mischief.
If you're lucky, one might land on your head....

### Sun Sprites 🌻
Create dust from the light and fly a lot. Builder/Exploration focused.

### Forge Sprites 🌋
Create dust from lava & fire for bursty flight. Combat focused.

### Skip Sprites 🐬
Create dust from swimming and glide in and out of the water. Speed focused.

<hr></hr> 

These are strong, mobility-centric origins with high early game drawbacks. They likely will out-scale vanilla origins, so be aware.

Thanks to @Neville, fishman of Stinky SMP  for their testing and feedback! And thanks to @AlexTheGreat625 for their excitement surrounding this project!

Abilities have particle effects and sounds!

# Shared 🌟
All sprites share these powers...

### 🤏 Pixiesque

You have 7 hearts, are half a block tall, and your reach is reduced.

Attack speed is slightly increased.

### 🌚 Hidden Mischief

You are invisible when riding, or when you have no dust.

Each sprite gains and uses dust differently.

### 💖 Blessed by a Fae

You can ride nearly anything* - even players!

Each Sprite has a unique way to buff mounts.

Damage dismounts you, setting this ability on cooldown.

Taking damage during the cooldown refreshes the cooldown.

### 💀 Tragic Coincidence

Chainmail, gold, iron, and netherite armors will damage you if worn.

Iron tools won't work for you at all.

### 🌻 Delicate Flower

Rockets hurt greatly when used.

Disabled if you have an Elytra equipped.

*bosses and mobs with empty-hand interactions (villagers) won't be ridable.


# Sun Sprites ☀️

Mostly visible in the daytime, Sun Sprites seek light, and glow reminiscent of amethyst. They fly easier and more often than other sprites; fluttering, dancing and dashing through the air. They channel the ability to float through crystals, and can share this flight with other creatures.

### ✨ Dancing Lights

Create pixie dust in light.

Glows soft purple above half dust.

### 🌬️ Sylph

You are winged.

Speed in air is greatly improved.

You break blocks faster in air.

### ☁️ Float
[crouch key]

In the air, you can toggle hover.

### 🧚‍♀️ Flutter
[secondary ability]

Pop a bit of dust, flying forward and upward.

### 💨 Dash
[primary ability]

Release a burst of dust to add forward momentum.

### 💜 Amethyst Conduit

Hold Amethyst Shards to float.

Hold in your offhand to float down.

Affects your mount.

### 📃 Paper Frame

Fire deals much more damage.

Swimming is a challenge, you are slower in water.


# Forge Sprites 🌋

Attracted to the lava near village forges, Forge Sprites can be found sleeping in crucibles. They love heat; transforming the energy into speed to dart through the air gliding down after. They can share their speed and fire with other creatures.

### 🔥 Dancing Embers

Create pixie dust in lava and fire.

Glows bright crimson above half dust.

### 👺 Ifrit

You are much faster in lava, and see underlava.

### 💫 Enkindle
[primary ability] 

Burn dust, zip forward, and float briefly.

Hold to use,  cancelled on release.

Grants you wings until you land.

### 💥 Blast Furnace
[secondary ability]

At more than half dust, expell all dust to ignite and push away entities nearby.

At max dust, this will smelt/cook held item stacks.

### ❤️‍🔥 Blaze Conduit

Channel pixie dust into Blaze Rods for speed.

Ignites mounts, granting fire immunity and speed.

### 🌋 Molten Soul

Water removes all dust, and makes you blind.

Water breathing effects prevent this.

Drowning damage kills you.


# Skip Sprites 🐬

Often spotted skipping over the water, searching for fish; Skip Sprites love rivers and the sea. They glide effortlessly between the air and underwater, alternating between each realm to build momentum. They can invoke dolphin's grace for themselves and others, and cleanse others of mining fatigue.

### 💧Dancing Droplets

Gain pixie dust in water.

Glows royal blue above half dust.

### 🐸 Kelpie 

In water you are faster, see better, and break blocks faster.

You don't sink unless you want to.

[ secondary ability ] toggles vision.

### 🐬 Flyswim

Dust grants elytra wings, and gliding costs dust.

Glide into water from the air to start flyswimming.

Use [ jump key ] to boost while flyswimming, costs air.

[ crouch key ] returns you to swimming (or falling).

Disabled if you have water breathing.

### ⏫ Geyser
[primary ability]

When in water, use dust to quickly rise upwards.

### 🐟 Undine

Underwater attacks heal your target; but siphon their air, and feed you.

### 💙 Heart Conduit

Hold a Heart of the Sea to grant dolphin's grace to you and your mount.

Also clears mining fatigue, but only for your mount.

### 🌊 Moist Frame

Touching lava evaporates all dust.

Heat (deserts, fire, lava) dries you out.

Without fire protection, you become slow and weak.
